channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.4
item.description:
• The first-run model download now shows a real, live percentage in the HUD and a progress bar in Settings, instead of looking stuck.
  • Reclaimed ~440 MB of disk used by an older speech model left behind by past updates.
  • The microphone list no longer shows phantom system audio devices (e.g. ones created during a FaceTime call).
  • Small Settings tidy-ups.
